security_level.text: What level of security do you need?

options.IND-CPA: Standard encryption (confidentiality only, secure against chosen-plaintext attacks)
options.none: No security needed (just encoding / testing purposes)

parallel_encryption.text: Do you need to encrypt data in parallel (e.g., on multi-core hardware or GPUs)?

parallel_decryption.text: Do you need to decrypt data in parallel?

random_access_decryption.text: Do you need to decrypt individual blocks without processing the entire message (random access)?

preprocessing_possible.text: Do you want to pre-compute the keystream before the actual plaintext is available?

mode_type.text: What type of cipher operation do you prefer?

options.stream: Stream cipher (processes data as a continuous stream)

error_propagation.text: If a single ciphertext block is corrupted during transmission, what error behavior is acceptable?

options.1_block: Only the corrupted block is affected (minimal propagation)
options.2_blocks: The corrupted block and the next block are affected
options.all_fail: The entire message is rejected (authentication fails)

iv_required.text: Is it acceptable for your system to generate and transmit a random initialization vector (IV) with each message?

runtime_efficiency.text: How important is raw encryption/decryption speed?

options.fast: Fast is fine (don't need absolute fastest)
